title: SOKA Paint Your Own Unicorn Money Bank Arts & Crafts Kit Piggy Bank DIY Fun Creative Stationery Easy to Decorate Ceramic Craft Activity – Gift for Girls and Boys of Any Age
features: COMPLETE CRAFT KIT: This craft kit includes 1 money bank, 1 sheet of sticky gems to embellish it, 3 brushes, and 12 non-toxic vibrant coloured paints. Everything your youngster needs to do is design a one-of-a-kind bank that they will be pleased to display as their own!

LIMITLESS CREATIVITY: Superb money bank with plenty of vibrant shades and accessories for countless hours of fun and creativity. No glue, no water, no messy stencils, just fun with our charming and engaging craft kit! To embellish each design, the kids choose the design and the colors they want to use.

DEVELOP SKILLS SET: Kids' artistic craft kits allow children to express themselves at the same time it is training fine motor skills and decision making. Children have the chance to build confidence, improve hand-eye coordination, grow as individuals, boost dexterity, and cultivate patience. This is a fun, screen-free exercise that may be enjoyed by a kid, with siblings, friends, or a family.

MAKE SAVING MONEY FUN: Financial literacy is crucial, but not all schools teach students about money and finances. Don't let this chance pass you by. Teach your child the value of saving money now. It is never too early to begin! To remove money there is a hole with a plug that is located at the bottom of the money bank.

IDEAL GIFT: A fantastic present for children. SOKA toys come in an elegant packaging so whether it's a birthday, Christmas, or any other occasion you cannot go wrong with this item when it comes to gifting a young child.
description: Product Description Let's Your Kids Enjoy! Allow your kids to try their hands at painting this ceramic unicorn money jar, which comes with sparkling glitter and lovely colours. Make Saving Money More Fun! Teach your child the value of saving money now. It is never too early to begin! To remove money, there is an outlet with a plug that is located at the bottom of the money bank. Certified Quality SOKA toys comply with the international toy safety standards and are made from renewable resources with non-toxic paints and lacquers. Practice Saving Money From An Early Age Financial literacy is crucial, but not all schools teach students about money and finances. Don't let this chance pass you by. Ideal Gift For Kids SOKA toys come in elegant packaging, and you can't go wrong with this item when it comes to gifting a young child for a birthday, Christmas, or any other occasion. This craft kit includes; 1 x money bank 1 x sheet of sticky gems 3 x brushes 12 x non-toxic vibrant coloured paints Easy To Follow Painting Instructions Dip the paint. Paint the money jar. Decorate the money jar with sticky gem. Put coins and notes in the money jar. No glue, no water, no messy stencils, just fun with our charming and engaging craft kit!
